title: Blurless Carved Pumpkin
description: 🎃 Removes the carved pumpkin blur overlay for a clean and unobstructed Minecraft experience 👀✨
body: # 🎃 Blurless Carved Pumpkin Remove the annoying carved pumpkin blur and enjoy a completely clear view while wearing carved pumpkins 👀✨ This lightweight vanilla-friendly resource pack replaces the default pumpkin overlay with a transparent texture, giving players better visibility in survival ⚔️, PvP 🏹, events 🎉, parkour 🧗, and minigames 🎮 without changing the normal Minecraft style. ## ✨ Features - 🎃 Removes carved pumpkin blur - 👀 Clean & transparent HUD - 🌿 Vanilla-friendly design - ⚡ Lightweight and simple - 🔥 Better visibility for gameplay - 📦 Compatible with most Minecraft versions Perfect for players who want the functionality and style of carved pumpkins without the obstructed screen overlay 🚀 --- ## 📩 Contact Us: --- ⚔️ Teams • 💰 Economy • 🎁 Custom Ranks - 🎮 **IP:** play.ownverse.fun - 🔌 **Port**: 19132 - 💬 **Discord:** [𝗢𝘄𝗻_𝗩𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗲™ 𝗦𝗠𝗣](https://discord.gg/WS6nnzeeKF) > ❤️ Sponsored by [Server.pro](https://server.pro/) ## Join now and start your adventure! --- ## [Server.pro](https://server.pro/) 🔥 Want smooth Minecraft hosting with no lag?
